title: Create realtime trend map MVP
description: Create the first MVP version of map-based discovery. Backend should expose venues with location and trend score. Frontend should display venues on a map with loading and error states.
acceptance_criteria: Endpoint returns venue id, name, address, latitude, longitude, district, categories, trend_score, and trending_dishes
Endpoint supports optional query parameters for district and dish
Response follows the existing TikFood API response format
Frontend has a map discovery page
Frontend displays venue markers using trend score
Frontend shows loading and error states
No delivery, cart, order, payment, or booking logic is added
Relevant tests are added or updated when possible
